messages.content:
According to recent news, the latest developments in AI include:

* SpaceX renting Nvidia chips to Reflection AI on the Colossus 2 supercomputer (Source: The Rundown AI on X)
* Oracle cutting 21,000 jobs as it embraces AI (Source: BBC News)
* AI potentially flagging issues with council homes sooner (Source: BBC News)
* Half of London firms reporting skills gap amid AI boom (Source: BBC News)
* A HR consultant winning an English court case using an AI lawyer in an apparent legal first (Source: The Guardian)

These updates are based on the latest news articles from reputable sources such as BBC News, The Guardian, and Forbes.
